_composer_instructions.description: DO NOT render this node in UI. This is for AI developer context only.
_composer_instructions.how_to_use: When generating the summary text for each module, randomly select one string from 'intro', one from 'data_statement', and one from 'conclusion'. Concatenate them with a space to form a complete paragraph.

overall_summary.{Brand_A}: Name of the first brand (e.g., PlayTime)
overall_summary.{Brand_B}: Name of the second brand (e.g., BingoPlus)
overall_summary.{Score_A}: Total winning categories for Brand A (e.g., 2)
overall_summary.{Score_B}: Total winning categories for Brand B (e.g., 0)

cashout_module.{Speed_A}: Speed rating of Brand A (e.g., Fast)
cashout_module.{Time_A}: Estimated arrival time for Brand A (e.g., within 1 hour)
cashout_module.{Time_B}: Estimated arrival time for Brand B

cs_module.{Score_A}: CS total score for Brand A (e.g., 7)
cs_module.{Score_B}: CS total score for Brand B
cs_module.{Response_A}: Response speed rating for A (e.g., Medium)

brand_heat_module.{Winner}: The brand with higher heat index
brand_heat_module.{Loser}: The brand with lower heat index

performance_module.{Winner}: The brand with better overall performance
performance_module.{FCP_Winner}: FCP time of the winning brand (e.g., 1s)
performance_module.{FCP_Loser}: FCP time of the losing brand
performance_module.{DNS_Winner}: DNS resilience percentage of the winner

game_variety_module.{TopGame_A}: Top #1 game of Brand A (e.g., Pusoy Go)
game_variety_module.{TopGame_B}: Top #1 game of Brand B (e.g., Chinese New Year 2)
game_variety_module.{Types_A}: Game categories for Brand A (e.g., PVP, FISH, RNG)
